comments.comment: Produced water from the Midale Complex is injected for waterflood to the same underground formation from which it was produced.  When water, gas or other material is returned to the source formation, it is not considered an emission.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment:
The Midale Complex has a vapour recovery unit installed on the gas boots of storage tanks at the facility, thus losses from the condensate and oil storage tanks have effectively been controlled.
